race.comment: STREETCAR FURY (1) demolished his rivals here first-up over the 900m burner before taking another step forward last start, finishing just 1.2 lengths off them in the John Hawkes Stakes. A proven track and trip specialist, he's been kept ticking over with a sharp 600m jump-out and can remain unbeaten at the venue. REAL DELUXE (10) returned in perfect style here over this distance a month ago, scoring with something in hand. Fitter again, she shapes as the immediate danger. BRAVE ACTION (6) was below his best in town last time in a strong form race but had impressed fresh here behind REAL DELUXE. The blinkers go on third-up, Holder takes over, and he looks over the odds. GRAND HOST (3) resumes and while he's yet to win fresh, boasts a strong record over this track and trip. Two solid trials suggest he's ready to run well.
